_meta.description: Self-improvement funnel pipeline-level events (ADR-0105 D6, FRE-719). One doc per event; today the only event_type is throttled_budget, emitted by promotion.py when the ADR-0040 review-bandwidth gate (issue_budget_threshold) pauses promotion -- makes the throttle a first-class queryable funnel state instead of a silent log.warning. dynamic:false — this is a small, purpose-built event stream (not a proposal document), explicit fields only. Index pattern agent-captains-funnel-events-YYYY-MM-DD.
